# Cost Monitor Skill

## Purpose

Track, analyze, and optimize AI/LLM infrastructure costs across all product features and workspace operations. Prevent cost overruns through real-time budget alerts, per-task spend attribution, and model optimization recommendations. Ensure AI feature economics are understood before scaling.

## Cost Tracking Architecture

```
Every LLM Call
    │
    ▼
[Log Entry] → docs/reports/ai/LLM_CALL_LOG.md
    │
    ▼
[Aggregator] → docs/reports/ai/COST_REPORT.md (daily/monthly)
    │
    ▼
[Alert Engine] → notify if daily/monthly budget exceeded
    │
    ▼
[Optimizer] → model downgrade recommendations
```

## Step-by-Step Workflow

### 1. Configure Cost Budget

In `docs/specs/ai/AI_CONFIG.yaml` (create if missing):
```yaml
cost_limits:
  daily_alert_usd: 10.0        # Alert when daily spend exceeds this
  daily_block_usd: 50.0        # Block non-critical calls when exceeded
  monthly_budget_usd: 200.0    # Monthly hard budget
  per_task_alert_usd: 1.0      # Alert on single call > this amount
  workspace_ops_budget_usd: 5.0 # Budget for NEZAM internal AI ops (not product)
```

### 2. Parse LLM Call Log

Read `docs/reports/ai/LLM_CALL_LOG.md` and extract:
- timestamp, provider, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, task_type, success

**Token cost reference (as of 2026 — verify current pricing):**

| Model | Input (per 1M tokens) | Output (per 1M tokens) |
|-------|----------------------|------------------------|
| GPT-4o | $2.50 | $10.00 |
| GPT-4o-mini | $0.15 | $0.60 |
| Claude 3.5 Sonnet | $3.00 | $15.00 |
| Claude 3 Haiku | $0.25 | $1.25 |
| Gemini 1.5 Pro | $1.25 | $5.00 |
| Gemini 1.5 Flash | $0.075 | $0.30 |
| Mistral Large | $2.00 | $6.00 |
| Mistral 8x7B | $0.27 | $0.27 |

> Always verify current pricing at provider dashboards — token costs change frequently.

**Cost formula per call:**
```
call_cost = (input_tokens / 1,000,000 × input_rate) + (output_tokens / 1,000,000 × output_rate)
```

### 3. Aggregate by Dimension

Compute spend sliced by:
- **Task type:** workspace ops vs. product feature vs. test/eval.
- **Model:** which model consumes the most cost.
- **Time period:** daily, weekly, monthly.
- **Provider:** cross-provider cost comparison.

### 4. Budget Alert Logic

```
IF daily_spend > daily_alert_usd:
  → append WARNING to COST_REPORT.md
  → notify team (via project alert mechanism)

IF daily_spend > daily_block_usd:
  → set flag in AI_CONFIG.yaml: throttle_mode: true
  → llm-integration skill reads flag → blocks non-critical calls

IF monthly_spend > monthly_budget_usd:
  → CRITICAL alert
  → all AI features degrade to manual fallback until reset
```

### 5. Model Optimization Recommendations

Analyze task_type vs. model usage and flag overengineered calls:

| Task type | Over-engineered if using | Recommended downgrade |
|-----------|-------------------------|-----------------------|
| Text classification | GPT-4o / Claude 3.5 | GPT-4o-mini / Haiku |
| Short summarization | GPT-4o | Gemini Flash / GPT-4o-mini |
| Simple extraction | Any Tier 1 model | Mistral 8x7B or local |
| Complex reasoning | GPT-4o-mini | Upgrade to GPT-4o (underengineered) |
| RAG retrieval scoring | Any cloud model | Local embedding model |

Generate specific call-level recommendations with estimated monthly savings.

### 6. Monthly Cost Report

Write/update `docs/reports/ai/COST_REPORT.md`:
```markdown
# AI Cost Report
Period: YYYY-MM
Generated: YYYY-MM-DD

## Summary
- Total spend: $X.XX
- Budget: $200.00 | Status: ✅ Under budget / ❌ Over budget
- Daily average: $X.XX
- Peak day: YYYY-MM-DD ($X.XX)

## Spend by Task Type
| Task Type | Calls | Input Tokens | Output Tokens | Cost |
|-----------|-------|--------------|---------------|------|
| product-feature | 450 | 1,200,000 | 300,000 | $3.24 |
| workspace-ops | 120 | 180,000 | 90,000 | $0.18 |

## Spend by Model
| Model | Calls | Cost | % of Total |
|-------|-------|------|------------|
| gpt-4o-mini | 480 | $2.87 | 82% |
| gpt-4o | 90 | $0.55 | 16% |

## Optimization Opportunities
1. 90 calls used GPT-4o for text classification → downgrade to GPT-4o-mini: save ~$0.45/month
2. 15 calls hit 4096 output tokens (truncated) → reduce max_tokens to 2048: save ~$0.12/month

## Alerts This Period
- 2026-05-08: Daily alert triggered ($12.40 vs $10.00 limit)
```

## Validation & Metrics
- Cost report updated weekly (not just monthly for high-volume products).
- No untracked LLM calls (all calls logged within 60 seconds).
- Budget alert response time < 1 hour for CRITICAL alerts.
- Optimization recommendations reviewed monthly; top opportunity actioned within 2 sprints.
- Workspace AI ops (NEZAM internal) < 20% of total AI spend.

## Integration Hooks
- Called by `llm-integration` skill after every LLM call (log append).
- Pairs with `agent-eval` skill — high-cost agents flagged for efficiency review.
- `/CHECK score` surfaces monthly cost status in health scorecard.
- `/SCAN ai` includes cost summary in output.
- Referenced by `devops-manager` and `cost-optimization-analyst` agents for budget governance.

## Anti-Patterns
- Tracking only total spend (no task attribution → blind to optimization).
- Setting `daily_block_usd` equal to `daily_alert_usd` (no warning before block).
- Using pricing from memory without checking current provider rates.
- Logging tokens but not task_type (can't compute ROI per feature).
- Ignoring small calls (50 calls/day at $0.01 = $18/month = $216/year).

## External Reference
- OpenAI Pricing: https://openai.com/pricing
- Anthropic Pricing: https://www.anthropic.com/pricing
- Google AI Pricing: https://ai.google.dev/pricing
- LiteLLM (unified cost tracking): https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/budget_manager
- Helicone (LLM observability + cost): https://helicone.ai/
